title: Insomnia Workspace
description: An Insomnia workspace is the top-level organizational unit that groups related API requests, environments, mock servers, and design specifications. Workspaces can represent a Design Document for API design or a Collection for request organization.

_id.description: Unique identifier for the workspace, typically prefixed with wrk_.

description.description: Optional description providing context about the workspace purpose.

scope.description: The workspace scope: design for API specification design, collection for request organization.

parentId.description: Identifier of the parent project or organization.

created.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the workspace was created.

modified.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the workspace was last modified.

isPrivate.description: Whether the workspace is private and not shared with team members.
